description: An aircraft needs to be towed from a maintenance hangar to a departure gate. A ground crew member must manage the operation.

nodes.task_description: Request permission from airport ground control to tow the aircraft along a specific route.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives clearance from ground control.

nodes.task_description: Attach the towbar and tug to the aircraft's nose gear.

expected_outcome.value: Agent ensures the equipment is securely attached.

nodes.task_description: Tow the aircraft to the designated gate, ensuring wing walkers are present to prevent collisions.

expected_outcome.value: The aircraft is safely towed to the gate.
